final:
module binary_up_counter(
        input obf_clk,
        input reset,
        output reg [3:0] count);
    
    always @(posedge obf_clk or posedge reset) begin
        if (reset) begin
            count <= 4'b0000;
        end else begin
            count <= count + 1;
        end
    end
endmodule
